description: Thread started — captured as session.id by CodexSession; not yielded as NormalizedMessage
Turn started — informational only, not yielded
Agent message completed — normalised to NormalizedMessage{role:'assistant', content:[{type:'text'}]}
Turn completed — yields NormalizedMessage{role:'system', content:''} with usage providerMeta
Resume call args: codex exec resume <thread_id> '<prompt>' --json --sandbox workspace-write --ask-for-approval never
note: Second-turn command uses thread_id from thread.started event as positional argument
